expectations.text: Exactly one new task .md file is created
Routed to the infrastructure BC (file-watcher/live-update transport is infrastructure, not agentic-workflow)
Task is in backlog/ with status backlog and context infrastructure
infrastructure INDEX backlog-list and Backlog count updated
protocol.md has a new capture entry referencing the task
The agent asked the user NO clarifying questions before filing

expectations.evidence: tags: [dashboard, sse, file-watcher, live-update, throttle, debounce, performance] -- no captured marker

expectations.text: Protocol entry uses the standard spec header format
expectations.evidence: freeform '## ... Idea captured (infrastructure)' with prose, no Type/BC/Filed-to fields
